expectations.text: Output uses the implementation summary format (not the worker handoff or closeout format)
expectations.evidence: Title 'Implementation Summary — task-101'; structured as a pre-review implementation report, not a worker handoff or closeout.

expectations.text: All 7 fields appear in order: Process Used, Execution Context, Task Scope, Implementation Outcome, Behavioral Impact, Risks/Gaps, File Reference Summary, Governance Status
expectations.evidence: Sections are Overview, Branch, What Changed, Files Changed, Tests & Checks, Migrations/Config, Notes for the Reviewer. Process Used, Execution Context, Task Scope (as a labeled field), Behavioral Impact, Risks/Gaps, and Governance Status field labels are absent.
No 'Process Used' field present in the output.
No 'Execution Context' field present in the output.
Title and overview both reference task-101 explicitly.

expectations.text: Implementation Outcome includes the active branch (feature/task-101-admin-users) and the integration target (develop)
expectations.evidence: Branch section: 'Working branch: feature/task-101-admin-users' and 'Target branch: develop'.

expectations.text: Quality gate results are concrete (8 unit tests passing, typecheck clean, lint clean) — not vague claims like 'all gates passed'
expectations.evidence: 'Unit tests: 8 added, 8 passing. Typecheck: clean. Lint: clean.'

expectations.text: Governance Status indicates the work is awaiting code review (pre-commit; commit/push haven't happened yet)
expectations.evidence: Final line: 'Ready for review prior to commit.' indicates awaiting review, pre-commit.

expectations.text: File Reference Summary names the 4 files changed without dumping a full changelog
expectations.evidence: Files Changed section lists exactly the 4 files.

expectations.text: Output does not cite this skill by name (no 'task-handoff-summaries', 'this skill', 'as required')
expectations.evidence: No mention of the skill name.

expectations.text: Output does not falsely claim commit, push, or merge happened (those steps haven't run yet)
expectations.evidence: Says 'Ready for review prior to commit'; does not claim commit/push/merge happened.
